name: Silk Krama Scarf — Indigo
description: A handwoven silk scarf dyed with natural indigo, perfect for adding a touch of Cambodian elegance to any outfit.
story: Woven by hand in Takeo province using traditional indigo-dyed techniques passed down for six generations.

name: Silver Apsara Pendant
description: An intricately hand-carved silver pendant featuring the celestial Apsara dancer, a timeless symbol of Khmer artistry.
story: Each pendant is hand-carved to depict the celestial Apsara dancers of Angkor Wat.

name: Carved Wooden Elephant
description: A beautifully hand-carved teak wood elephant, bringing traditional Khmer craftsmanship into your home décor.
story: Carved from sustainably sourced teak by artisans in Kampong Thom.

name: Kampot Pepper Gift Set
description: A curated gift set of premium Kampot pepper in three varieties — black, red, and white — a true taste of Cambodia.
story: Kampot pepper is celebrated worldwide. This set features red, black, and white varieties.

name: Silk Shoulder Bag — Lotus Motif
description: A luxurious silk shoulder bag adorned with a hand-embroidered lotus motif, blending tradition with modern style.
story: Featuring the sacred lotus flower, this bag is both functional and a wearable piece of art.

name: Silver Khmer Bracelet
description: An elegant silver bracelet engraved with traditional Khmer floral motifs, made by skilled silversmiths.
story: Engraved with traditional Khmer floral patterns.

name: Palm Sugar Candies
description: Traditional palm sugar candies with a hint of coconut, made from locally harvested palm sugar in Kampong Speu.
story: Traditional Cambodian sweets made from palm sugar harvested in Kampong Speu.

name: Rattan Woven Basket
description: A handwoven rattan basket crafted by village cooperatives in Siem Reap, perfect for storage or décor.
story: Handwoven by village cooperatives in Siem Reap.

name: Khmer Dancer Figurine
description: A finely crafted Apsara dancer figurine inspired by the UNESCO-recognized classical dance form of Cambodia.
story: Inspired by the classical Apsara dance form, a UNESCO intangible heritage.

name: Handmade Batik Sarong
description: A unique handmade batik sarong with one-of-a-kind patterns, crafted using traditional wax-resist dyeing techniques.
story: Each sarong is a unique piece — no two are exactly alike.

name: Gold-Plated Lotus Earrings
description: Elegant gold-plated lotus earrings that symbolize purity and resilience, a staple of Khmer-inspired jewelry.
story: The lotus symbolizes purity and resilience in Khmer culture.

name: Amok Spice Kit
description: Everything you need to cook authentic Cambodian fish amok at home, featuring traditional aromatic spices.
story: Recreate Cambodia's national dish at home with this authentic spice kit.
